_structure: Complete game state data model organized by scope.

global_scope._description: Persistent across all runs. Never cleared except on new game.

roster.name: string
roster.generation: integer (0 for recruits, increments on each breeding cycle)

genes._note: Genes persist on character. Inherited at birth from parents. Define card unlock pool.

roster._note: Trained skills persist on character. Once learned, always available (teacher dependency breaks after learning).

unlocked_trainings.name: string
unlocked_trainings._note: Once unlocked globally, any character can be taught it (if teacher exists). Event-based trainings refresh after campaign.

run_scope._description: Active run state. Cleared on new run or run conclusion.

active_roster._note: Equipment condition decays post-campaign (0.0 = broken, 1.0 = pristine). Repair costs gold.

breeding_queue.teacher_id: character_id (retired or alive character with trained_skills match)

resources.campaign_gold: integer (earned this run, resets next run)

discovered_mates.compatibility: enum: compatible | incompatible (optional based on design)
discovered_mates._note: Potential mates found at events. Available for breeding decisions.

composition._note: Cards derived from inherited genes. Count/power depends on full vs. cheap rearing.

deck._note: Cards derived from trained_skills. Cheap rearing unlocks fewer cards per training.

teacher_status._note: Retired characters can still teach. Cannot participate in campaigns while teaching.

notes.card_mechanics: Draw 5 at battle start, draw 2 each round. Spent cards go to discard. When discard reaches threshold, reshuffle into deck pool.
notes.gene_card_pool: Full children get all gene-based cards from both parents. Cheap children get subset (design detail pending: count vs. potency).
notes.training_persistence: Once a character learns a training, it persists. Teacher is no longer needed after learning. But teacher must exist at time of teaching.
notes.equipment_decay: Post-campaign, equipment condition drops. Repair cost gates equipment investment, creating resource tension.
notes.retirement_and_teaching: Retired characters cannot fight but can still teach. This allows long-term teacher pipeline.
